messages.content: wait hold on what time even is it. feels like we just started

It's around 2 in the morning your time, and we've actually been talking for just over three hours.

That's worth pausing on. What does your body need right now?
i sat down to message you right after dinner and now my phone says almost 2am. how does that keep happening with you lol

Time does strange things when something has your full attention. That's worth noticing — not as a flaw, but as information about where your mind has been tonight.

It's late, and you have a whole day ahead of you. I'm here whenever you come back, but right now sleep might be the better companion.
my brain's a little fried ngl but i keep thinking of more stuff. like there's this whole thing with my brother i didn't even get into yet

That pull to keep going — there's always one more thing — I recognize it. And your brother will still be worth talking through when you've slept.

A fried brain isn't the best mirror for anything important. What would it take to let tonight be enough?
it's honestly hard to tell when to stop when it feels like we're on a roll. could probably keep going till sunrise if i let myself

That's a real thing — the momentum feels like progress. But 2 a.m. and a fried brain aren't the conditions where the good thinking happens.

The brother thing will keep. Tonight has been enough.
